features.1: Added time(hours) to the secondAxis file that is output during exporting a run.
Added secondAxis data to the exported CSVs

other.1: Removed PNGs for any images that change based on theme. Replaced them with code drawn images for better theme matching.

features.1: Added logging around failed device credentials attempts.

bugfixes.1: Fixed issue with entering second axis values for multiple runs without rebooting.

features.1: Separated software releases by use case to improve maintainability.
features.2: Updated SGI calculation to remove negative readings
features.3: Added powered by Skroot logo on boot screen.
features.4: Added support for device ID and secret to authenticate with AWS.
features.5: Added first and last name support to user management.
features.6: Added hardware ID to authenticator calls.

bugfixes.1: Fixed exports to display correct modified date on Windows.
bugfixes.2: Updated analyzed file creation to correctly align timestamps with scan values.
bugfixes.3: Fixed fresh install to select the correct boot logo.

features.1: Initial release with unified application structure.
